docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,275.88 FILED BY HOCHSTEIN, ILENE M. ATTY AT LAW AS TO DEFENDANT MACFERREN, CHARLENE AKA RAVANI, CHARLENE E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
